pages.title: Gamma.app
pages.content:
# Gamma.app
> AI-powered platform for creating presentations, documents, websites, and more — instantly and beautifully.

## Developer Documentation
- [Gamma API Documentation](https://developers.gamma.app/llms.txt): API reference and integration guides for building with the Gamma API

## Home & Company
- [Gamma Homepage](https://gamma.app/): Gamma's homepage showcasing its AI-powered platform for instantly creating polished presentations, documents, and websites. Includes product highlights, templates, and customer stories.
- [About Gamma](https://gamma.app/about): Company information about Gamma, including its mission to simplify content creation with AI, founding story, and leadership team profiles.

## Products
- [Documents](https://gamma.app/products/documents): AI-powered document creation tool for generating, formatting, and collaborating on professional documents.
- [Presentations](https://gamma.app/products/presentations): AI presentation builder with slide design automation, visual themes, and collaboration tools.
- [Social Media](https://gamma.app/products/social-media): Social media content generation tools for post design, automation, and brand consistency.
- [Websites](https://gamma.app/products/websites): AI-built websites with customizable layouts and integrated media.

## Solutions
- [Consultants](https://gamma.app/solutions/consultants): Streamline client proposals, reports, and presentations.
- [Educators](https://gamma.app/solutions/educators): Prepare lessons, training materials, and student-friendly presentations.
- [Marketing](https://gamma.app/solutions/marketing): Campaign planning, branded collateral, and quick creative iteration.
- [Sales](https://gamma.app/solutions/sales): Build persuasive sales decks, proposals, and follow-up materials.

## Pricing
- [Pricing](https://gamma.app/pricing): Subscription tiers, feature differences, and a free tier option.

## Templates
- [Templates](https://gamma.app/templates): Ready-to-use templates for presentations, documents, websites, and more.

## Insights & Blog
- [Blog](https://gamma.app/insights): Articles on AI, design trends, productivity tips, and customer stories.
- [Author: Zach Leach](https://gamma.app/insights/author/zach-leach): All published insights from Zach Leach.
- [Design Leader Interview](https://gamma.app/insights/beyond-just-be-creative-how-a-design-leader-tackles-the-dreaded-blank-canvas): Strategies for overcoming creative block and starting new projects.
- [Slide Count Guide](https://gamma.app/insights/how-many-slides-per-presentation): Optimal slide counts for different presentation types.
- [Background Image Tips](https://gamma.app/insights/how-to-choose-the-perfect-background-images-for-your-presentation-slides): Choosing impactful, professional presentation backgrounds.
- [Narration Tips](https://gamma.app/insights/how-to-narrate-your-presentation): Recording and delivering engaging presentation narration.
- [Update: AI Image Editing](https://gamma.app/insights/introducing-ai-image-editing-in-gamma-more-control-more-creativity): New AI image editing tools for more customization and control.
- [Case Study: Emily Fabiano](https://gamma.app/insights/launched-with-gamma-how-emily-fabiano-turned-policy-expertise-into-a-scalable-course): Scaling policy expertise into an online course.
- [Update: GPT-Image-1](https://gamma.app/insights/openais-gpt-image-1-now-available-in-gamma): Integration of OpenAI's GPT-Image-1 into Gamma's creative suite.
- [10-20-30 Method](https://gamma.app/insights/the-10-20-30-method): Concise and impactful storytelling rule.
- [Inspiration](https://gamma.app/inspiration): Curated gallery of Gamma-created projects.

## Categories
- [Category: Announcements](https://gamma.app/insights/category/announcements): Company and product announcements.
- [Category: Inspiration](https://gamma.app/insights/category/inspiration): Design and creativity inspiration.
- [Category: Product Updates](https://gamma.app/insights/category/product-updates): Detailed product update notes and release highlights.
- [Category: Stories](https://gamma.app/insights/category/stories): Customer stories and success case studies.
- [Category: Thought Leadership](https://gamma.app/insights/category/thought-leadership): Thought leadership on AI, design, and productivity.

# Effortless AI design for presentations, websites, and more

Your ideas are brilliant. The universe deserves to see them. A captivating pitch deck? Easy. A stunning website? Done. Make anything you can imagine almost as quickly as you can think it up.

[Start for free](https://gamma.app/signup?)Watch video

### [Presentations](https://gamma.app/products/presentations)

Turn any idea into a polished slide deck. Export to PPT, PDF, and more.

### [Documents](https://gamma.app/products/documents)

Structured, visual documents — from one-pagers to white papers — ready to share.

### [API](https://gamma.app/products/api)

Create with Gamma programmatically. Automate creation, integrate with your tools, and scale your content.

### [Social Media](https://gamma.app/products/social-media)

Generate platform-ready social content — sized, styled, and ready to post.

### [Websites](https://gamma.app/products/websites)

Generate a shareable, hosted website in minutes — no developers needed.

### [Graphics](https://gamma.app/products/graphics)

Create and edit custom, on-brand graphics — from infographics to illustrations — with our AI design agent.

## Creative content at the speed of light.

Generate

### Skip the blank page, create brilliance in a flash.

- Start with an idea, paste in an outline, or import existing content
- 20+ AI models for highest-quality output
- Import your brand or use one of our 100+ themes

[Start for free](https://gamma.app/signup?)

Shape

### Edit with AI, in just a click.

- Instantly add smart layouts, rich content, and translations
- Generate images and rework with AI
- Collaborate real-time with your team

[Start for free](https://gamma.app/signup?)

Share

### Shareworthy content, wherever you need it.

- Export as PPT, PDF, PNG, or Google Slides
- Publish as a website or social post, or share as a link
- Track engagement metrics

[Start for free](https://gamma.app/signup?)

## Join 50+ million users changing how the world communicates

Beyond saving me hours of labor that I now channel into more meaningful work, **Gamma has made me something of a campus hero!**

English Language Development Teacher

Founder

© 2026 Gamma Tech, Inc.

 

## About our cookies 🍪

Gamma and its third-party tools process personal data. You can opt out of the sale of your personal information by clicking on the “Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information” link. [Cookie Notice](https://gamma.app/cookie-notice)

Privacy Settings

Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information

## Cookie & Privacy Settings

## Cookie & Privacy Settings

- ### Your Privacy
 
- ### Strictly Necessary Cookies
 
- ### Sale of Sharing/Targeted Advertising
 

#### Your Privacy

When you visit our website, we store cookies on your browser to collect information. The information collected might relate to you, your preferences or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to and to provide a more personalized web experience. However, you can choose not to allow certain types of cookies, which may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings according to your preference. You cannot opt-out of our First Party Strictly Necessary Cookies as they are deployed in order to ensure the proper functioning of our website (such as prompting the cookie banner and remembering your settings, to log into your account, to redirect you when you log out, etc.). For more information about the First and Third Party Cookies used please follow this link. 
[More information](https://gamma.app/cookie-notice)

#### Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

- ##### Functional Cookies
 
 Always Active
 
 These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
 

Cookies Details‎

#### Sale of Sharing/Targeted Advertising

 Sale of Sharing/Targeted Advertising

As a California consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale or sharing of your personal information at any time across business platform, services, businesses and devices. You can opt-out of the sale and sharing of your personal information by using this toggle switch. As a Virginia, Utah, Colorado and Connecticut consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale of your personal data and the processing of your personal data for targeted advertising. You can opt-out of the sale of your personal data and targeted advertising by using this toggle switch. For more information on your rights as a United States consumer see our privacy notice.

- ##### Analytics Cookies
 
 Switch Label label
 
 These cookies collect information on how users interact with our Site and enable us to improve how it operates.
 

- ##### Targeting Cookies
 
 Switch Label label
 
 These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
 

Cookies Details‎
